privacy.notes: This contract bundle contains synthetic metadata fixtures only. Licensed code tables are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: coding-set registry list
commands.notes: List synthetic coding-set registry entries without embedding licensed code tables.

commands.name: coding-set registry validate-compatibility
commands.notes: Check whether a synthetic registry entry is compatible with a target pricing year or release window.

registry_entry_types.label: Coding-set family
registry_entry_types.purpose: Logical coding-set group represented by metadata only.

registry_entry_types.label: Release snapshot
registry_entry_types.purpose: Versioned registry snapshot for a specific pricing year.

registry_entry_types.label: Compatibility profile
registry_entry_types.purpose: Declared support window and compatibility policy.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only registry
compatibility_rules.description: Reject registry entries that embed licensed code tables or code rows.

compatibility_rules.label: Supported release window
compatibility_rules.description: Require the requested target year to fall within the declared compatibility window.

compatibility_rules.label: Explicit compatibility basis
compatibility_rules.description: Record the metadata basis used to declare compatibility instead of implying a silent match.

compatibility_rules.label: Referential consistency
compatibility_rules.description: Require validation records to reference registry entries that are present in the committed fixture set.

examples.name: registry-entries
examples.description: Synthetic registry entry listing with metadata-only records.

examples.name: compatibility-validation-pass
examples.description: Synthetic compatibility validation output showing a supported target year.

examples.name: compatibility-validation-fail
examples.description: Synthetic compatibility validation output showing an unsupported target year.
